title: DFTO: annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "This report presents DfT Operator Limited’s (DFTO’s) annual report and financial statements for the year ended 31 March 2025.  This report sets out the activities of DFTO between 1 April 2024 and 31 March 2025.  It includes detailed information on its:   strategy and directors corporate governance and independent auditing consolidated and company income, financial position, cash flows and changes in equity financial statements   "
